title: DualWielding
body:
![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/GXaq3Ne.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/DualWielding/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/DualWielding/issues)


Dual Wielding will enable you to fight with a weapon in your off hand. ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/TbvZXX6.png)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
